mapper.select: SELECT id, wechat_openid, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, wechat_id, qq, avatar_audit_status, avatar_audit_remark, avatar_audited_by, avatar_audited_at, failed_login_count, locked_until, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT id, wechat_openid, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, wechat_id, qq, avatar_audit_status, avatar_audit_remark, avatar_audited_by, avatar_audited_at, failed_login_count, locked_until, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE wechat_openid = #{wechatOpenid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (wechat_openid, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, wechat_id, qq, failed_login_count, locked_until, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{wechatOpenid}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{wechatId}, #{qq}, #{failedLoginCount}, #{lockedUntil}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET failed_login_count = #{failedLoginCount}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, failed_login_count = #{failedLoginCount}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, wechat_id = #{wechatId}, qq = #{qq}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET wechat_openid = #{wechatOpenid}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, failed_login_count = #{failedLoginCount}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE users SET avatar_audit_status = #{avatarAuditStatus}, avatar_audit_remark = #{avatarAuditRemark}, avatar_audited_by = #{avatarAuditedBy}, avatar_audited_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
